scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data to check synchronisation of systems

Prerequisite:
    - SyncLEDir Body must be included in SmartTrack

Scenario description:
    - Start of recording
    - Hold SyncLEDir in front of the systems and check if all FoVs include SyncLEDir box and backprojection filter recognizes SyncLEDir 
    - Stop of recording
scenarios.name: SyncLEDir Val Pretest 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide calibration files

Scenario prerequisite:
- No person shall be visible in the recording
- Steering wheel and driver seat settings must be set to driver's normal driving position
- Calibration rod must be inside the vehicle and correct mounting must be checked

Scenario description:
- Start of recording
- Execute calibration tool
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Calibration Rod Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data for eye gaze
- TargetROI activities:
  - Driver looks at defined target points in the vehicle
  - Driver shall try not to blink for the duration of the confirmation

Scenario prerequisite:
- Driver wears head target 
- List and Schedule for Target Points are linked in TargetROI GUI
- TargetROI GUI is visible to the driver and audio is audible on the driver seat
- Driver sits on driver seat, wears seatbelt and vehicle doors are closed

Scenario description:
- Start of recording and Target ROI GUI
- Driver must move their head in a slow 8-movement for ~10s
- Driver confirms the instructions given by the TargetROI GUI and executes them till the next action is announced
- Driver repeats the process until Target ROI GUI announces ""Measurement finished""
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: TargetROI Points Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data for entry of driver, driver presence and exit of driver

Scenario prerequisite:
- Driver wears head target 
- No person is visible in the images at the beginning and in the end of the recording

Scenario description:
- Start of recording
- Driver executes their normal entry routine: Open door, enter vehicle, close door, fasten seatbelt,...
- Driver acts as if he is driving for 2 min
- Driver executes their normal exit routine: Unbuckling, open door, exit the vehicle, close door,..
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Driver In Drive Out Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data for headposes above the abnormal thresholds
- Target ROI activities:
    - Head up > 30°
    - Head down >30°
    - Head left > 45°
    - Head right > 45°

Scenario prerequisite:
- Driver wears head target 
- List and Schedule for Abnormal Headpose are linked in TargetROI GUI
- TargetROI GUI is visible to the driver and audio is audible on the driver seat
- Driver sits on driver seat, wears seatbelt and vehicle doors are closed

Scenario description:
- Start of recording and Target ROI GUI
- Driver must move their head in a slow 8-movement for ~10s
- Driver confirms the instructions given by the TargetROI GUI and executes them till the next action is announced
- Driver repeats the process until Target ROI GUI announces ""Measurement finished""
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Abnormal Headpose Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data with cigarettes 
- TargetROI activities 
   - Hold a cigarette (object length must be >= 3cm) and make sure >60% is visible and its <2cm away from the head 
 1) Cigarette in mouth between fingers 
 2) Cigarette in mouth held with end of fingers 
 3) Cigarette only in mouth 
 4) Cigarette close to face <2cm away 

Scenario prerequisite:
- Driver wears head target 
- List and Schedule for Smoking are linked in TargetROI GUI 
- TargetROI GUI is visible to the driver and audio is audible on the driver seat
- Driver sits on driver seat, wears seatbelt and vehicle doors are closed 

Scenario description:
- Start of recording and Target ROI GUI
- Driver must move their head in a slow 8-movement for ~10s
- Driver confirms the instructions given by the TargetROI GUI and executes them till the next action is announced
- Driver repeats the process until Target ROI GUI announces "Measurement finished"
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Smoking Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data for closed eyes
- TargetROI activities:
  - Driver looks at defined target points in the vehicle with closed eyes

Prerequisite:
- Driver wears head target 
- List and Schedule for Eyes Close are linked in TargetROI GUI
- TargetROI GUI is visible to the driver and audio is audible on the driver seat
- Driver sits on driver seat, wears seatbelt and vehicle doors are closed

Scenario description:

scenarios.name: Eyes Close Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data of a drive in real traffic
- Duration: >30 min
- TargetROI activities
  - Driver looks at target points from TargetROI_Points_Val_01 if traffic allows it

Prerequisite:
- Driver wears head target 
- List and Schedule for Target Points are linked in TargetROI GUI
- TargetROI GUI is visible to the driver and audio is audible on the driver seat
- Driver sits on driver seat, wears seatbelt and vehicle doors are closed

Scenario description:
- Start of recording and Target ROI GUI
- Driver must move their head in a slow 8-movement for ~10s
- Driver starts the drive
- Driver follows route shown by navigation device  or provided by supervisor
- When the traffic allows it, driver confirms the instructions given by the TargetROI GUI and executes them till the next action is announced
- Driver drives for > 30 minutes or until Target ROI announces ""Measurement finished""
- Driver drives to a secure parking slot and stops the drive 
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Naturalistic Drive TargetROI Points Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data of people with various drowsiness levels in a simulator
- Duration: 1-6h
- Rating GUI:
  - Driver must rate himself on KSS scale from 1 to 9 every 5min
  - Driver drives until they fall asleep or until they have a KSS level ≥ 7 depending on the duration of the drive

Scenario prerequisite:
- Driver does NOT wear head target 
- KSS levels in national language are linked in Rating GUI
- Rating GUI is visible to the driver and audio is audible on the driver seat
- Driver sits on driver seat, wears seatbelt and vehicle doors are closed

Scenario description:
- Start of recording and Rating GUI
- Driver must move their head in a slow 8-movement for ~10s
- Driver rates himself
- Driver starts the drive
- Driver follows route shown by the simulator
- Driver must rate their drowsiness every 5min
- Driver stops the drive 
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Drowsiness Simulator Val 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data with fake driver 
- Spoofing material: 
 - Face printed on paper (includes photographs of faces from humans, drawings, etc.) statically positioned before the camera. 
 - Face printed on paper with different reflection properties and qualities. 

Scenario prerequisite:
- Spoofing material is in the driver headbox during the complete recording 
 - Supervisor's head is not trackable to the camera (e.g. wearing IR blocking glasses and a balaclava) 

Scenario description:
- Start of recording 
- System must run for ~10s  
- Supervisor displays spoofing material and moves it if defined 
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Fake Driver Paper Static 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data with fake driver 
- Spoofing material: 
 - Face printed on paper dynamically positioned (includes both moving and rotating) before the camera. 
 - Face printed on paper with different reflection properties and qualities. 

Scenario prerequisite:
- Spoofing material is in the driver headbox during the complete recording 
 - Supervisor's head is not trackable to the camera (e.g. wearing IR blocking glasses and a balaclava) 

Scenario description:
- Start of recording 
- System must run for ~10s  
- Supervisor displays spoofing material and moves it if defined 
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Fake Driver Paper Dynamic 01

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data with fake driver 
- Spoofing material: 
 - Face printed on paper deformed (includes bending the paper in different ways to make it appear less 2D) before the camera. 
 - Face printed on paper with different reflection properties and qualities. 

Scenario prerequisite:
- Spoofing material is in the driver headbox during the complete recording 
 - Supervisor's head is not trackable to the camera (e.g. wearing IR blocking glasses and a balaclava) 

Scenario description:
- Start of recording 
- System must run for ~10s  
- Supervisor displays spoofing material and moves it if defined 
- Stop of recording
scenarios.name: Fake Driver Paper Deformed 01

- Stop of recording

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data with fake driver 
- Spoofing material: 
 - 3D dolls and mannequins or masks (worn by a head-shaped object) that looks lifelike, dynamically positioned (includes both moving and rotating) before the camera - with the actual face being static (facial expressions, eyes, eyelids, mouth etc.). 

Scenario prerequisite:
- Spoofing material is in the driver headbox during the complete recording 
 - Supervisor's head is not trackable to the camera (e.g. wearing IR blocking glasses and a balaclava) 

Scenario description:
- Start of recording 
- System must run for ~10s  
- Supervisor displays spoofing material and moves it if defined 
- Stop of recording

scenarios.description:
Scenario goal:
- Provide data with fake driver 
- Spoofing material: 
 - Video of a real person behaving as a driver, or any of the other supported spoofing attempts, being shown on different electronic devices. 

Scenario prerequisite:
- Spoofing material is in the driver headbox during the complete recording 
 - Supervisor's head is not trackable to the camera (e.g. wearing IR blocking glasses and a balaclava) 

 Scenario description:
- Start of recording 
- System must run for ~10s  
- Supervisor displays spoofing material and moves it if defined 
- Stop of recording
